Syph..Back: Rheumatic stiffness and lameness in back. Aching in whole spine.
Syph..Back, pain: Aching in whole spine. Pain in region of kidneys, aggravated after urinating. Pain in sacrum, aggravated while sitting. Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
Syph..Extremities: Inflammation of joints. Rheumatism, muscles are caked in bard knots or lumps. Pain in limbs ameliorated by heat, aggravated from sunset to sunrise. Stiffness of all the joints.
Syph..Generalities: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning. From sundown to sunrise marks the time of many violent pains and sufferings. Some are better from heat, and some are better from cold air and cold applications, There is great prostration in the morning on waking.
Syph..Head: Syphilitic invalids are often sufferers from violent neuralgic headaches. Violent pains in sides of head, forehead or temples. Pain from temple to temple, from ear to ear, one eye to occiput; supraorbital pains.
Syph..Mind: Forgetful. Weak minded. Laughing and weeping without cause. He cannot remember faces, names, dates, events, books or places. He cannot calculate. Despair of recovery. Melancholia. Fears he is going insane. Imbecility. Indifferent to his friends, and feels no delight in anything.
Syph..Mouth: Mouth and tongue ulcerated. Breath foetid. Tongue soft, spongy, easily indented in persons who have long taken Mercury. Paralysis of tongue, one-sided. Tongue red, excoriated, cracked and sore. Patches on tongue. Denuded patches. Red spots. Copious viscid saliva in mouth.
Syph..Skin: The eruptions are numerous, but may be studied better by consulting the numerous works on syphilis, as this is not a study of the disease, but the nosode.
Syph..Clinical: It has cured many cases of epilepsy. Epileptic convulsions after menses. When there is ulceration of legs, throat, mouth or other parts with no repair. Fistulous openings, exostoses, fissures, tubercles and warts have been cured promptly.
Syph..Face: Neuralgia of face. Paralysis of one side of face. Tubercles and copper-colored eruption on face. It has palliated cancerous ulceration of face. Scabby eruption on face. It has cured rupia on the cheek. Papules and pustules.
Syph..Head, pain: Violent pains in sides of head, forehead or temples. Pain from temple to temple, from ear to ear, one eye to occiput; supraorbital pains. Pain sometimes ameliorated by warmth. Bursting pains; fullness of head. Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness.
Syph..Extremities, pain: Pain in limbs ameliorated by heat, aggravated from sunset to sunrise. Rheumatic pains and swelling of joints of upper limbs. Neuralgia of limbs gradually, increasing, aggravated as the night goes on.
Syph..Extremities, pain, leg: Nightly pain and swelling in legs. Pains in lower extremities, preventing sleep, aggravated from hot applications, ameliorated by pouring cold water on them. Severe bone aches in legs at night in bed.
Syph..Mouth, ulcers: Mouth and tongue ulcerated. Ulceration of soft palate. Caries of hard palate. Soft palate entirely destroyed. Bleeding from ulcers.
Syph..Skin, eruptions: Syphilinum often does bring back the ulcers in the throat and the eruptions. The eruptions are numerous, but may be studied better by consulting the numerous works on syphilis, as this is not a study of the disease, but the nosode.
Syph..Clinical, ulcers: When there is ulceration of legs, throat, mouth or other parts with no repair. Fistulous openings, exostoses, fissures, tubercles and warts have been cured promptly.
Syph..Back, pain, evening: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning.
Syph..Back, pain, night: Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
Syph..Face, eruptions: Tubercles and copper-colored eruption on face. Scabby eruption on face. It has cured rupia on the cheek. Papules and pustules.
Syph..Extremities, night: Nightly pain and swelling in legs. Severe bone aches in legs at night in bed. Pain in back of feet and toes at night in bed. Pains often aggravated in warm bed at night. Pains drive him out of bed at night.
Syph..Back, evening: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning.
Syph..Back, night: Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
Syph..Head, night: Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights.
Syph..Head, occiput: Violent crushing pains in occiput. Stupefying headaches in the forehead or occiput. Cutting pains in occiput.
Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights. Neuralgia of head beginning at 4 P.M., growing gradually worse until midnight and then gradually better, ceasing at daylight.
Syph..Head, pain, night: Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights. Neuralgia of head beginning at 4 P.M., growing gradually worse until midnight and then gradually better, ceasing at daylight.
